reason: Successfully navigated to the agent chat interface, verified agent status, sent a math question, received a correct response
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents including "QA-20260318-234507-5k7u idle"
Clicked on "QA-20260318-234507-5k7u" agent in sidebar - Successfully navigated to agent landing page with message input interface
Verified agent status is "idle" - Agent status indicator in header displays "idle" (meets requirement of "running" or "idle")
Typed and sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully submitted to agent
Waited for response - Agent responded in 2 seconds (well within 3-minute timeout)
Verified response mentions "4" - Agent response clearly displays "4." as the answer to 2+2, confirming correct functionality
